topic: CLI -> MCP Host -> MCP Server -> Agent -> Web Client 闭环交互链路优化

findings.finding: MCP Protocol Version 2025-06-18 supersedes old HTTP+SSE transport. Project uses StreamableHTTPServerTransport — correct modern approach.
findings.detail: Streamable HTTP is the current recommended transport for multi-client remote scenarios.

findings.finding: enableJsonResponse: true disables streaming progress — long-running tools cannot stream progress updates
findings.detail: If tools become slow (large monorepos), switch to SSE streaming with progress notifications.

findings.finding: MCP 2025-06-18 adds optional outputSchema to tool definitions for structuredContent responses
findings.detail: Current tools return JSON.stringify(payload) as text. Adding outputSchema reduces LLM token waste.

findings.finding: MCP resources with subscribe:true enables agent-side caching with notifications/resources/updated
findings.detail: AGENTS.md and rule files re-read on every tool call. Resources primitive eliminates redundant file I/O.

findings.finding: MCP prompts primitive pre-packages multi-step tool sequences
findings.detail: Reduces unnecessary back-and-forth for common workflows like 'start a new feature'.
When listChanged:true is advertised, server SHOULD send this notification. Agent continues using stale tool list.

best_practices.practice: Tool descriptions drive LLM behavior — imperative phrasing ('MANDATORY: Call before...') is a common pattern for enforcing call order
best_practices.rationale: Tool description and inputSchema are the primary mechanism for LLM to decide when/how to call tools

best_practices.practice: outputSchema reduces token waste by providing type hints to LLM
best_practices.rationale: LLM receives structured output hints, reducing need to infer structure from text

best_practices.practice: SSE reconnect should use Last-Event-ID header
best_practices.rationale: Auto-reconnect without Last-Event-ID loses events during disconnect period

best_practices.practice: Expose static/semi-static context as MCP resources with subscribe:true
best_practices.rationale: Allows agent-side caching, eliminates redundant file reads, reduces payload size

alternatives.cons: Cannot serve web client from same process; breaks HTTP dual-mode
SSE is simpler, HTTP-native, auto-reconnect built-in; no bidirectional need from server

alternatives.option: Use MCP sampling for agent sub-tasks
alternatives.pros: Server can request LLM completions without API keys
alternatives.cons: Adds round-trip through host; over-engineering for current scope

alternatives.option: Add MCP prompts primitive for workflow templates
alternatives.cons: Requires host UI to expose prompt picker

pitfalls.issue: FABRIC_PROJECT_ROOT via process.env is global mutation — breaks if two servers in same process
pitfalls.mitigation: Pass projectRoot explicitly through context object

pitfalls.issue: JsonlEventStore full scan on every replay — grows with server lifetime
pitfalls.mitigation: Cap event store or use in-memory ring buffer with persistence

pitfalls.issue: One McpServer instance per HTTP session — tool registrations replicated per session
pitfalls.mitigation: Shared server with per-request context injection via session metadata
Validate header on all HTTP requests post-initialization per spec

codebase_gaps.current_approach: Re-read AGENTS.md and rule files on every fab_get_rules call
codebase_gaps.recommended_approach: Expose as MCP resources with subscribe:true + notifications/resources/updated

codebase_gaps.current_approach: Agent uses stale tool list until reconnect after sync-meta
All tools return text with JSON.stringify(payload)
codebase_gaps.recommended_approach: Add outputSchema for structuredContent responses per MCP 2025-06-18

codebase_gaps.current_approach: EventSource auto-reconnects but doesn't pass Last-Event-ID; missed events lost
codebase_gaps.recommended_approach: Capture lastEventId, reconnect with Last-Event-ID header

codebase_gaps.gap: No event buffer for SSE reconnect at HTTP layer
codebase_gaps.current_approach: Only sends events after connection established
codebase_gaps.recommended_approach: Small ring-buffer of last N events per client, replay on reconnect

sources.title: MCP Transports
sources.key_takeaway: stdio vs Streamable HTTP, session management, resumability

sources.title: MCP Prompts
sources.key_takeaway: Prompt templates for pre-packaging interaction sequences
